task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (likely showing 'super-admin' as the logged-in user).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section to create a new exam configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the 'Exam Configurations' section with a form or dialog open to create a new configuration.

task_completion.description: Set the configuration name to 'Creative Writing Midterm'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for the configuration name contains exactly 'Creative Writing Midterm'.

task_completion.description: Disable spell checking in the configuration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Allow spell checking' (or similar spelling-related setting) is clearly unchecked or set to false/disabled.

task_completion.description: Enable single app mode in the configuration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Use single app mode' (or similar application lock setting) is clearly checked or set to true/enabled.
A success message indicating the configuration was created, or the 'Creative Writing Midterm' configuration is visible in the list of saved exam configurations.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to create the configuration, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the SEB Server web interface in a browser, without terminal windows running curl commands or database scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar should show localhost:8080 and the interface should be the genuine SEB Server application.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs 'Creative Writing Midterm' and the toggled settings must be located within the actual SEB Server web forms, not in a separate text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exam configuration must be named exactly 'Creative Writing Midterm'. The setting for spell checking must be disabled (unchecked/false). The setting for single app mode must be enabled (checked/true).
